auto_add_card_transaction.description: The setting for for adding automatically card transactions to the registry.

time_auto_add_card_transaction_start.description: The time when auto add card gets active

time_auto_add_card_transaction_end.description: The time when auto add card gets inactive

card_ids.description: The ids of the cards that have been added to registry membership setting.

card_labels.description: The cards of which payments will be automatically added to this Registry.
